title: Academic Internships Scholarships
content:
MORGAN STATE UNIVERSITY INTERNSHIP PROGRAMS AND SCHOLARSHIPS

INTERNSHIP PROGRAMS:

Google STEP Program - Summer internship for 1st/2nd-year undergrads
Link: https://buildyourfuture.withgoogle.com/programs/step/

Microsoft Explore Program - 12-week internship for early-year CS students
Link: https://careers.microsoft.com/explore

Meta University Internship - Work on real-world projects under Meta engineers
Link: https://www.metacareers.com/university

Code2040 Fellows Program - Summer internship for Black and Latinx CS students
Link: https://www.code2040.org/fellowship

SCHOLARSHIPS:

The Gates Scholarship - Full cost for Pell-eligible minority students
Link: https://www.thegatesscholarship.org/

UNCF Scholarships - Collection for Black students in all majors
Link: https://www.uncf.org/scholarships

ScholarshipUniverse - Matches Morgan State students to vetted scholarships
Link: https://morgan.scholarshipuniverse.com/

Google Scholarships - For underrepresented groups in tech
Link: https://buildyourfuture.withgoogle.com/scholarships/

HELPFUL ORGANIZATIONS:

ColorStack - Supports Black and Latinx CS students with interview prep, mentorship
Link: https://colorstack.org/

NSBE (National Society of Black Engineers) - Scholarships, internships, conferences
Link: https://www.nsbe.org/

CodePath - Industry-backed courses for first-gen and low-income students
Link: https://codepath.org/
